basic_details.job_title: FDDI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Faculty and Lab Assistant Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff
basic_details.short_information: Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI) has released the FDDI Recruitment 2026 notification for Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff posts. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced on a contractual basis. Candidates possessing a Graduate or Master's Degree and meeting the prescribed age criteria (General: 35 years, OBC: 38 years, SC/ST: 40 years, and PwD: 45 years) are eligible to apply. The application process is being conducted in offline mode, and interested candidates must submit their applications on or before 19 June 2026. Candidates can check the official notification and

age_limit.age_details: Gen: 35 Yrs, OBC: 38 Yrs, SC/ST: 40 Yrs, PWD: 45 Yrs
age_limit.details: Junior Faculty: Minimum Age: 35 Years. Age relaxation applicable for OBC (3 years), SC/ST (5 years), PWD (10 years). Lab Assistant: Minimum Age: 40 Years. Age relaxation applicable for OBC (3 years), SC/ST (5 years), PWD (10 years).

qualification.details: Junior Faculty: Bachelor's degree in Footwear manufacturing with minimum 55% Marks. Master's degree in Footwear manufacturing with minimum 55% Marks. Bachelor's degree in Footwear Design and Technology with specialization in Design with minimum 55% Marks. Master's degree (of min. 02 years) duration after Graduation) in any field from a recognized university with min. 55% marks from a recognized university/institute. Experience: Academic and/or Industry Experience of at least 01 year in Footwear manufacturing with knowledge of manual design and Operating 2D and 3D Shoe Designing software is desirable. OR Academic and/or Industry experience of at least 01 year in Footwear Retail and Fashion Merchandise domains outlined in the job description. Lab Assistant: Candidates must be practically sound in Machine operation, Quality/aspect pattern making, CAD/CAM and Footwear testing. Bachelor's degree in Footwear manufacturing with minimum 55% Marks. Candidates must be practically sound in 10th Pass or 12th Pass or Bachelor's degree of minimum 01 year duration after Graduation) in any field from a recognized university/institute. Experience: Candidates with experience in Footwear Upper in Footwear industry footwear sample making. OR Academic and/or Industry experience of at least 01 year in the field of Footwear sample making.

salary_details.pay_scale: Junior Faculty: Rs. 50,000/- per month. Academic Support Cadre staff: Rs. 30000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for FDDI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: fddiindia.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the FDDI Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff posts is 19th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff positions at the Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI), Guna campus.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Junior Faculty?
faq.answer: For the Junior Faculty position, candidates need a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Footwear manufacturing or a Bachelor's degree in Footwear Design and Technology with a specialization in Design, with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to FDDI posts?
faq.answer: The general age limit is 35 years for Junior Faculty and 40 years for Lab Assistant. Age relaxation is provided for OBC, SC/ST, and PWD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Faculty position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Faculty position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month. For Academic Support Cadre staff, the salary is Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is the application process online or offline for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment drive is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it physically to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these FDDI posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff positions at FDDI will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of relevant supporting documents, including qualification certificates, experience proof, age proof, and any other relevant details as mentioned in the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address for submitting the offline application?
faq.answer: The physical application should be submitted to: The Executive Director, Footwear Design and Development Institute, Puraposar road, Gram Haripur, Maharjpura, Guna 480001 (MP).
